description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks' carousel, moving from the 'AI Interview' card to the 'Survey' card.
frame_description: The screen shows a horizontal list of task cards under the heading 'Short tasks'. The view shifts from a pink 'AI Interview' card to a light pink 'Survey' card.

description: User hovers over the 'Survey' task card, causing its background color to change from light pink to yellow.
frame_description: The 'Survey' card in the 'Short tasks' section changes color, indicating a hover state.
